ideas.title: Resurface
ideas.description:
1. Private List extension on Google Chrome Store
2. Check backend - cold starts, setup cron jobs.
3. Check dashboard and labels with demo account
4. Figure out mass bookmark export
5. Fix emails through Resend
6. Send out test emails with waitlist + signup
7. Draft few X posts.

ideas.title: FOLIO - Repo Manager
ideas.description:
1. Switch from local Ollama to cloud model
2. Setup Github OAuth + Google OAuth
3. Allow users to upload local files + setup backend + cloud storage
4. Add LinkedIn Page - post generator
